## Checklist

- [ ] No credentials, media files, or server-specific paths committed
- [ ] `defined('MOODLE_INTERNAL') || die()` added to any new library files
- [ ] Lang strings added for any new user-facing text
- [ ] Related issue linked (if applicable)
